name: Poligrafici Printing S.p.A.
summary: Poligrafici Printing S.p.A. engages in printing business in Europe. It prints flyers, newspapers, rivistes, magazines, and books. The company was founded in 1885 and is based in Bologna, Italy. Poligrafici Printing S.p.A. operates as a subsidiary of Poligrafici Editoriale S.p.A.
